    "Severe 120Hz electromagnetic hum combined with high-frequency crackling/arcing sounds",
    "Loose termination or failing breaker contact causing thermal and fire hazard"

    "Immediately isolate the electrical panel and de-energize the affected circuits",

  "rationale": "The audio recording reveals a highly distinct, severe 120Hz electrical hum accompanied by intermittent crackling and sizzling, which is characteristic of electrical arcing and loose connections under load. This represents an immediate fire and safety hazard that requires urgent isolation and remediation.",

    "NEC 110.14(D) Terminal Connection Torque",
    "NEC 110.12 Mechanical Execution of Work",
    "NFPA 70E Standard for Electrical Safety in the Workplace"
